query:
SELECT 
  quotationNumber,
  clientId,
  total,
  status,
  createdAt,
  subtotal,
  transportCost
FROM quotations
WHERE total > 0
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute

  quotationNumber,
  clientId,
  total,
  status,
  createdAt,
  subtotal,
  transportCost
FROM quotations
WHERE total > 0
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 50;
